headline: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM): Strongest Q1 Results from the Home Furnishing and Improvement Retail Group
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) and its peers.
